mizerMR 0.3.0.0

Package index

Setting multiple resources

resource_params() `resource_params<-`()
Resource parameters
setMultipleResources() resource_capacity() `resource_capacity<-`() resource_rate() `resource_rate<-`() resource_interaction() `resource_interaction<-`() initialNResource(<mizerMR>) `initialNResource<-`(<mizerMR>)
Set up multiple resources
newMRParams()
Create a new multi-resource, multi-species model

Accessing results of simulations

NResource(<mizerMRSim>) finalNResource(<mizerMRSim>)
Access resource abundances in simulation result
plotSpectra(<mizerMRSim>) plotSpectra(<mizerMR>)
Plot the abundance spectra
getDiet(<mizerMR>)
Get diet of predator at size, resolved by prey species
plotDiet(<mizerMR>) plotDiet(<mizerMRSim>) plotDietMR() experimental
Plot diet, resolved by prey species, as function of predator at size.
plotResourceLevel()
Plot the proportion of the resource spectrum(s) compared to their carrying capacity
plotResourcePred() plotlyResourcePred()
Plot functions regarding the resources. Compatible with non mizerMR objects Plot the mortality applied on the resource spectrum(s)
animateSpectra.mizerMRSim() experimental
Animation of the abundance spectra
scaleModel(<mizerMR>) scaleRates(<mizerMR>) setResource(<mizerMR>) summary(<mizerMR>)
Multiple-resource methods for model rescaling and reporting

Species utilities

addSpecies(<mizerMR>)
Add species to a mizerMR model
removeSpecies(<mizerMR>)
Remove species from a mizerMR model
renameSpecies(<mizerMR>)
Rename species in a mizerMR model
expandSizeGrid(<mizerMR>)
Expand the size grid of a mizerMR model

Internal helper functions

validResourceParams()
Validate resource parameter data frame
valid_resources_arg()
Helper function to assure validity of resources argument
set_resource_param_default()
Set a resource parameter to a default value
mizerMR-class mizerMRSim-class
mizerMR marker classes
mizerMRBaseResource() mizerMRValidBaseResource() getEncounter(<mizerMR>) getPredRate(<mizerMR>) getResourceMort(<mizerMR>) getRates(<mizerMR>) projectEncounter(<mizerMR>) mizerMREncounter() mizerMRResourceEncounter() projectResourceMort(<mizerMR>)
Multiple-resource project methods
mizerMR_dynamics()
Multiple-resource dynamics
plotDietData()
Format and plot MR diet data
expect_unchanged()
Expect a mizer object to be unchanged
.onLoad()
Register mizerMR with mizer
.strip_mr()
Strip the MR extension from params

On this page
